title: Karlsten Bed Bug Killer – Ultra Strong Pest Control Spray – Pro Bed Bug Protection – (5 Litres) HSE 10668 Registered
features: PROFESSIONAL BED BUG KILLER UK Health & Safety registered 10668 -Karlsten Ultra Strong kills Bed Bugs .. Protect yourself and eliminate bed bug infestations with this pest control solution
DIRECT USE ON MATTRESSES BUT NOT SHEETS OR PILLOW CASES – Do not use on Human or pet bedding

IDEAL FOR RESISTANT PESTS – worried about stubborn bed bugs that won’t die? Say no more! Karlsten pro killer is proven to kill even the toughest of bugs that are resistant to most common cypermethrin sprays on the market. Unlike traditional pesticides, ours pro formula will eradicate the bugs and their eggs.

Extended Residual Kill up to 3 Months– this ultra-strong pesticide remains effective 3 months after the initial spray. Using it on your mattress means you do not have to use it for another 3 months. The long-lasting residue ensures you do not have to spray your beddings or affected area regularly.

HSE REGISTERED 10668 BRAND – we are a proudly registered and approved brand. Our bed bug killer spray is safe for use at your home or university dorm as it follows standards set by the Environmental Protection Agency.
